scripts.build:blog: cd blog-site && npm run build && rm -rf ../public/blog && mkdir -p ../public/blog && cp -r dist/* ../public/blog/
scripts.build:pro: cd pro-test && npm install && npm run build
scripts.prebuild: npm run build:openapi && npm run build:agent-skills
scripts.build: npm run build:blog && tsc && vite build
scripts.build:desktop: node scripts/build-sidecar-sebuf.mjs && node scripts/build-sidecar-handlers.mjs && tsc && vite build
scripts.build:full: npm run build:openapi && npm run build:agent-skills && npm run build:blog && cross-env-shell VITE_VARIANT=full "tsc && vite build"
scripts.build:tech: npm run build:openapi && npm run build:agent-skills && cross-env-shell VITE_VARIANT=tech "tsc && vite build"
scripts.build:finance: npm run build:openapi && npm run build:agent-skills && cross-env-shell VITE_VARIANT=finance "tsc && vite build"
scripts.build:happy: npm run build:openapi && npm run build:agent-skills && cross-env-shell VITE_VARIANT=happy "tsc && vite build"
scripts.build:commodity: npm run build:openapi && npm run build:agent-skills && cross-env-shell VITE_VARIANT=commodity "tsc && vite build"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:runtime && npm run test:e2e:full && npm run test:e2e:tech && npm run test:e2e:finance
scripts.test:sidecar: node --test src-tauri/sidecar/local-api-server.test.mjs api/_cors.test.mjs api/youtube/embed.test.mjs api/cyber-threats.test.mjs api/usni-fleet.test.mjs scripts/ais-relay-rss.test.cjs api/loaders-xml-wms-regression.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:visual:full: cross-env VITE_VARIANT=full playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom"
scripts.test:e2e:visual:tech: cross-env VITE_VARIANT=tech playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom"
scripts.test:e2e:visual: npm run test:e2e:visual:full && npm run test:e2e:visual:tech
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update:full: cross-env VITE_VARIANT=full playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom" --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update:tech: cross-env VITE_VARIANT=tech playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom" --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update: npm run test:e2e:visual:update:full && npm run test:e2e:visual:update:tech
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run version:sync && cross-env VITE_DESKTOP_RUNTIME=1 tauri dev -f devtools
scripts.desktop:build:full: npm run version:sync && cross-env VITE_VARIANT=full VITE_DESKTOP_RUNTIME=1 tauri build
scripts.desktop:build:tech: npm run version:sync && cross-env VITE_VARIANT=tech VITE_DESKTOP_RUNTIME=1 tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.tech.conf.json
scripts.desktop:build:finance: npm run version:sync && cross-env VITE_VARIANT=finance VITE_DESKTOP_RUNTIME=1 tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.finance.conf.json
